title: macrotyloma chrysanthum
intro: Macrotyloma chrysanthum, also known as Horse gram, is a legume plant native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Macrotyloma chrysanthum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, aid in weight management, and help regulate blood sugar levels. It is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or powder, and can also be consumed as a supplement, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
